assignments.name: dataset_name
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const value = $json.body?.dataset_name; return value === undefined || value === null || value === '' || value === 'undefined' ? 'para_crawl/enpt' : String(value); })() }}

assignments.name: max_tokens
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const value = $json.body?.max_tokens; return value === undefined || value === null || value === '' || value === 'undefined' ? 64 : Number(value); })() }}

assignments.name: epochs
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const value = $json.body?.epochs; return value === undefined || value === null || value === '' || value === 'undefined' ? 2 : Number(value); })() }}

assignments.name: threshold
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const value = $json.body?.threshold; return value === undefined || value === null || value === '' || value === 'undefined' ? 0.0 : Number(value); })() }}

assignments.name: git_sha
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const value = $json.body?.git_sha; return value === undefined || value === null || value === '' || value === 'undefined' ? 'unknown' : String(value); })() }}

parameters.command: =docker run --rm --network mlops-challenge_mlops -v {{ $env.HOST_WORKSPACE_PATH }}:/workspace -e WRAPT_DISABLE_EXTENSIONS=1 -e PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 mlops-challenge-ml:local python -m ml.prepare_dataset --output_dir data/processed --dataset_name {{ $json.dataset_name }} --max_tokens {{ $json.max_tokens }} --train_records 500 --val_records 100 --seed 42

=docker run --rm --network mlops-challenge_mlops -v {{ $env.HOST_WORKSPACE_PATH }}:/workspace -e WRAPT_DISABLE_EXTENSIONS=1 -e PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 mlops-challenge-ml:local python -m ml.train --data_dir data/processed --artifacts_dir artifacts --epochs {{ $('Parâmetros').item.json.epochs }} --batch_size 32 --threshold {{ $('Parâmetros').item.json.threshold }} --max_tokens {{ $('Parâmetros').item.json.max_tokens }} --git_sha {{ $('Parâmetros').item.json.git_sha }}

=docker run --rm --network mlops-challenge_mlops -v {{ $env.HOST_WORKSPACE_PATH }}:/workspace -e WRAPT_DISABLE_EXTENSIONS=1 -e PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1 mlops-challenge-ml:local python automation/publish_artifact.py --artifacts_dir artifacts --run_id {{ $('Parsear Resultado').item.json.run_id }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, run_id: $('Parsear Resultado').item.json.run_id, status: 'deployed', metric_value: $('Parsear Resultado').item.json.metric_value }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, run_id: $('Parsear Resultado').item.json.run_id, status: 'deploy_failed_rollback', reason: 'Falha no deploy — modelo anterior restaurado', previous_run_id: $('Modelo Atual').item.json.run_id }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, run_id: $('Parsear Resultado').item.json.run_id, status: 'rejected', reason: 'Modelo abaixo do threshold', metric_value: $('Parsear Resultado').item.json.metric_value, threshold: $('Parsear Resultado').item.json.threshold }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ received: true, source: 'grafana', status: 'acknowledged', alert: $json.body?.title || $json.body?.message || 'unknown' }) }}
